results.reference_transcription: 大家好，欢迎参加今天的会议。今天我们要讨论第三季度的销售报告。 好的，谢谢。根据数据显示，我们第三季度的总收入达到了两千五百万美元，比去年同期增长了百分之十五。 这个增长率非常不错。能详细说一下各个地区的表现吗？ 当然可以。亚太地区表现最好，增长了百分之二十二。北美地区增长了百分之十。欧洲地区基本持平。 我注意到人工智能产品的销售额增长特别快。这个趋势能持续吗？ 我们预计下个季度人工智能相关产品将继续保持强劲增长。客户对实时翻译和语音识别的需求越来越大。
results.reference_translation: Hello everyone, welcome to today's meeting. Today we'll be discussing the third quarter sales report. Okay, thank you. According to the data, our total revenue for the third quarter reached twenty-five million dollars, an increase of fifteen percent compared to the same period last year. That growth rate is very impressive. Could you go into more detail about the performance in each region? Of course. The Asia-Pacific region performed the best, growing by twenty-two percent. North America grew by ten percent. Europe remained essentially flat. I noticed that sales of artificial intelligence products have been growing particularly fast. Can this trend continue? We expect that AI-related products will continue to maintain strong growth next quarter. Customer demand for real-time translation and speech recognition is increasing.
